## Environment

- **OS**: (e.g. Ubuntu 22.04, macOS 14, Windows 11)
- **Python version**: (e.g. 3.11.4)
- **claude-sleuth version**: (e.g. 1.0.0)
- **Installation method**: (e.g. `pip install -e .`, `pip install -e ".[all]"`)
- **Dependency group(s) installed**: (e.g. `network`, `geo`, `all`)

## Additional Context

Any other information that might be relevant — screenshots, config snippets, related issues.
